text: Subah termination email dekha aur dimaag sunn ho gaya, par rone ka time nahi hai kyunki agle mahine ki home loan EMI ka sawal hai. Papa kisan thay aur unhone mujhe is umeed mein padhaya tha ki main parivaar sambhaalunga, isliye main thak kar baith nahi sakta. Mere liye breakdown ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta; mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah naya rasta dhoondna hai taaki ghar ki 'izzat' bachi rahe.

Naukri chali gayi hai par main laptop band nahi kar sakta kyunki bacchon ki school fees aur vehicle loan ki kist sar par hai. Savings wipe out ho chuki hain aur debt spiral ka darr hai, par 'structural endurance' hi meri pehchaan hai kyunki main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon. Thakan itni hai ki sharir jawab de raha hai, par main thak sakta hoon par ruk nahi sakta kyunki mere peeche poora khandaan khada hai.

Termination letter milte hi laga jaise saans ruk gayi, par EMI bounce hui toh bank wale gaon mein phone karenge aur 'log kya kahenge' ye soch kar darr lagta hai. Health neglect karke saalon se kaam kar raha hoon aur ab bhi mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga taaki ghar ka chula chalta rahe. Mere paas mental health ke liye waqt nahi hai, mujhe bas apne parivaar ki 'shaan' bachane ke liye bina ruke ladte rehna hai.

Subah email aaya aur ab sahukaar ka vyaj chukane ka darr dimaag mein ghar kar gaya hai, par main chup-chap doosri shift dhoondne nikal gaya hoon. Chit fund mein Papa ke paise doobne ke baad saara bojh mere kandhon par hai, isliye breakdown karna gunah lagta hai. Mujhe bas bina ruke endure karte rehna hai kyunki mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai.

MNC ki job chali gayi par main bimar hone ka bahana bhi nahi kar sakta kyunki agle hafte home loan ki kist bharni hai. 45 saal ki umar mein ab kahan jaunga pata nahi, par remittance band hui toh gaon mein sab bhookhe marenge. Mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai, aur mujhe bas apne kartavya ke liye endure karna hai.
